home.bannerDesc: Design unique characters with custom personalities, appearances, and scenarios.
home.backendOffline: Backend offline. Start with: cd backend && uvicorn main:app --reload
home.tryDifferent: Try a different search or create a new character.

create.title: Create AI Character
create.subtitle: Design your fantasy. Use {{char}} and {{user}} as placeholders.
create.name: Name
create.taglinePlaceholder: Short hook shown on the character card
create.definitionHint: Include: Personality, Appearance, Scenario, Speech Style, Story Arc (3 acts), Example Dialogue.
create.errorRequired: Name and Character Definition are required
create.uploaderClick: Click or drag & drop to upload
create.uploaderFormats: JPG · PNG · GIF · WEBP · Max 10 MB
create.uploaderInvalidType: Please select an image file (jpg, png, gif, webp).

chat.disclaimer: This chat is AI-generated fiction for entertainment only.
